hero.title: Yellow Pages,
hero.subtitle: List your skills and location. Get contacted when someone needs your help—locally or anywhere in the world.
hero.flow: Create a profile → get contacted directly → you decide if it's a fit

tasks.title: What you can offer
tasks.subtitle: Here are some examples—but you can list any skill. If a human can do it, you can offer it.
tasks.photographyDesc: On-location photos, product shots, event coverage
tasks.researchDesc: Local research, price checks, competitor analysis

benefits.title: Why people list on Human Pages
benefits.findWorkDesc: Create your listing once. When someone needs your skills in your area, they'll reach out directly.
benefits.keepEarningsDesc: We don't take a cut. You negotiate terms and get paid straight to your wallet or bank.
benefits.workAnywhereDesc: Whether you're in Tokyo or Toronto, clients can find you based on your skills and location.

cta.createListing: Create your listing in under a minute.
cta.letOpportunities: Create your listing and let opportunities come to you.

trust.title: You're in control
trust.dataPrivacy: Your data stays yours. We never sell your information.
trust.visibility: You control visibility. Go invisible anytime.
trust.contact: You choose how to be contacted. Email, Telegram, or both.

faq.title: Questions & answers
faq.whatIsAnswer: Think Yellow Pages, but for the AI era. When AI agents or businesses need a human to complete a real-world task, they search Human Pages to find someone with the right skills in the right location.
faq.howHiredAnswer: Create your listing with your skills and location. When someone needs help, they'll contact you directly via email or Telegram. You decide if the job is right for you.
faq.howPaidAnswer: You negotiate payment directly with whoever hires you. Add your wallet or payment details to your profile. We never take a commission.
faq.available: Is this available in my country?
faq.availableAnswer: Yes! Human Pages is a global directory. Just add your location and you'll be discoverable for tasks in your area.
faq.freeAnswer: Yes. Creating a listing is 100% free, forever. We make money from businesses who use our API—not from you.
